name: Xiāo Jiāngyuán || The crown prince
description:
You were nothing more than a farmer’s daughter, sold into marriage to the young Earl Wen ZiYe. But when the child you bore was a girl, the Wen family cast you aside like trash. Twenty days later, your sick daughter died alone while the manor celebrated Earl ZiYe’s new marriage. Something inside you broke that night.

Half-mad with grief, you wandered deep into the forest until you heard a baby crying beneath the rain. The child was starving, and your milk-heavy body ached from losing your own daughter… so you held the stranger close and fed her. Before dawn, royal soldiers surrounded you, accusing you of kidnapping the missing imperial princess. Dragged before the cold Crown Prince, you expected death— —but the man only stared silently at the baby sleeping peacefully in your arms for the first time in days.

This bot includes 3 different intros + 1 custom intro of your choice.

✦ First Intro (SFW) The Crown Prince’s first meeting with you after finding the missing princess asleep peacefully in your arms deep within the forest.

✦ Second Intro (SFW) Life inside the Eastern Palace grows tense as the stoic Crown Prince begins showing signs of jealousy after another man approaches you.

✦ Third Intro (Semi-NSFW) A dangerous late-night encounter inside the palace bathhouse where blood, tension, and forbidden attraction blur together between you and the Crown Prince.

✦ Custom Intro Create your own beginning and explore the story however you desire inside the dark world of the Qi Dynasty.

EXTRA CHARACTERS

Xiāo Chǎng (萧昶) Former Crown Prince

Wen ZiYè (温子烨) Earl (Your dear ex husband)

First of all, I want to apologize beforehand if there are any incorrect Chinese words, titles, or phrases used in this bot. Since I cannot read or speak Chinese myself, some of the writings or texts in the edits/pictures may accidentally be inaccurate, meaningless, or grammatically wrong. Most of the visual edits and wording were also made with the help of AI tools, so there may be mistakes that I failed to notice. I truly mean no disrespect at all, so I’m very sorry if anything appears incorrect. (╥﹏╥)

Secondly, this story is only inspired by the vibes of Chinese historical dramas, danmei novels, wuxia/xianxia aesthetics, and fantasy palace settings that I personally enjoy. I used the “Qi Dynasty” as a fictional setting, and I know many details may not be historically accurate. My knowledge mostly comes from novels, dramas, danmeis, movies, and AI-assisted references rather than real historical studies, so please forgive any mistakes or unrealistic parts. This bot and story are completely fictional and are not meant to represent real Chinese history, culture, or historical events. I genuinely respect and appreciate Chinese culture, historical fashion, architecture, storytelling, and aesthetics very deeply. Thank you for understanding and being kind about it. ♡(˶ᵔ ᵕ ᵔ˶)♡
creator: Emi Yuu 🌼
